applicationProcess: Create a free Stainless account at stainless.com with your GitHub account.
Email opensource@stainless.com with details about your project to get set up on the free Starter plan.
description: Free Starter plan (normally $79/mo per generator) for qualifying non-commercial open-source projects, including SDK, documentation site, and MCP server generation from OpenAPI specs.
eligibility: Project must be a non-commercial open-source (FOSS) project.
Project must have a public OpenAPI specification.
name: Stainless Open Source Program

perks.description: Generate TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, Kotlin, Ruby, and C# SDKs from your OpenAPI spec at no cost.
perks.title: SDK Generation

perks.description: Auto-generated API documentation sites and MCP servers from your OpenAPI spec.
perks.title: Documentation & MCP Servers

perks.description: Starter plan features including 50 endpoints, 300 preview builds per month, SSE streaming, and OAuth 2.0 auth support.
perks.title: Starter Plan Features
